title: Bedwars legends
description:

body:
🏹 Bedwars 1.21 Modpack – Modern Combat, Classic Fun

Step into the ultimate Bedwars experience in Minecraft 1.21! This modpack is built for fast-paced PvP gameplay, optimized for both casual players and competitive warriors. With performance-boosting mods, smooth combat mechanics, and helpful utilities, you'll enjoy fluid battles and strategic defense like never before.

Whether you're hosting a private server or practicing clutch plays solo, this pack keeps the focus where it belongs—on action, precision, and victory.

🔧 Features:
Built on Minecraft 1.21

Enhanced performance (Sodium, Lithium, Entity Culling)

PvP-ready (Better Combat, Custom Crosshair, Minimal Visual Clutter)

Smart utilities (Xaero’s Minimap, Mouse Tweaks)

Optimized UI and pre-tuned settings

Lightweight and server-friendly

Protect your bed. Break theirs. Be the last one standing.
